info.title: MakePlans API
info.description: API for MakePlans - online appointment booking, scheduling and signups for classes/events.

get.summary: Get all occurrences of a recurring booking

delete.summary: Delete all recurring bookings in a collection

put.summary: Cancel all recurring bookings in a collection

get.summary: List available slots for a service

List all bookings for an event
List all services for a category
List all users with account access
